sentence: Hoje n茫o est谩 calor nem vento.
ipa: 藞蓴蕭e 藞n蓯虄w虄 e藞sta k蓯藞l蓴r 藞ne虄 藞ve虄tu
gloss_en: Today it is neither hot nor windy.
notes: Open [蓴] in coda-rhotic 'calor' and alveolar trill [r] per couto1994; nasal [岷絔 in 'vento' per goncalves1996.

sentence: O bilhete custa mil francos.
ipa: u bi藞蕩蓻te 藞kust蓯 藞mi色 藞fr蓯虄kos
gloss_en: The ticket costs a thousand francs.
notes: Guinean currency the CFA franc per kihm1994; palatal [蕩] in 'bilhete', dark coda [色] in 'mil' and nasal [蓯虄] in 'francos' per couto1994.

sentence: Tenho consulta na quinta-feira de manh茫.
ipa: 藞t蓻刹u ko虄藞su色t蓯 n蓯 藞ki虄t蓯 藞fejr蓯 de m蓯藞刹茫
gloss_en: I have an appointment on Thursday morning.
notes: Palatal [刹] in 'tenho'/'manh茫' and dark coda [色] in 'consulta' per couto1994; retained /ej/ in 'feira' per kihm1994.

sentence: A minha fam铆lia mora numa tabanca perto do rio.
ipa: 蓯 藞mi刹蓯 f蓯藞mili蓯 藞m蓴r蓯 藞num蓯 t蓯藞b蓯虄k蓯 藞p蓻rtu du 藞蕘iu
gloss_en: My family lives in a village near the river.
notes: Kriol-origin lexicon 'tabanca' (village) widely used in Guinean Portuguese per kihm1994; strong [蕘] in 'rio' and palatal [刹] in 'minha' per couto1994.

sentence: Vira 脿 direita e segue sempre em frente.
ipa: 藞vir蓯 a di藞rejt蓯 i 藞s蓻伞e 藞se虄pre e虄 藞fre虄te
gloss_en: Turn right and keep going straight ahead.
notes: Retained /ej/ in 'direita' and alveolar trill [r] in the 'fr' cluster of 'frente' per couto1994; imperative register per goncalves1996.

sentence: Esta bianda de peixe est谩 muito boa.
ipa: 藞蓻st蓯 bi藞蓯虄d蓯 de 藞pej蕛e e藞sta 藞mujtu 藞b蓴蓯
gloss_en: This fish bianda is very good.
notes: Kriol-origin lexicon 'bianda' (staple rice-and-sauce meal) per kihm1994; retained /ej/ in 'peixe' and open [蓴] in 'boa' per couto1994.

sentence: Onde fica o lumo desta terra?
ipa: 藞o虄de 藞fik蓯 u 藞lumu 藞d蓻st蓯 藞t蓻r蓯
gloss_en: Where is this town's weekly market?
notes: Kriol-origin lexicon 'lumo' (periodic country market) per kihm1994; alveolar trill [r] in 'terra' per couto1994; interrogative register per goncalves1996.

sentence: Quantos francos custa o peixe fresco?
ipa: 藞kw蓯虄tos 藞fr蓯虄kos 藞kust蓯 u 藞pej蕛e 藞fr蓻sku
gloss_en: How many francs does the fresh fish cost?
notes: Guinean CFA franc per kihm1994; nasal [蓯虄] in 'quantos'/'francos', retained /ej/ in 'peixe' and alveolar trill [r] in 'fresco' per couto1994.

sentence: Se chovesse, fic谩vamos em casa.
ipa: se 蕛o藞v蓻s毯e fi藞kav蓯mos e虄 藞kas蓯
gloss_en: If it rained, we would stay home.
notes: [蕛] onset in 'chovesse' per couto1994; conditional-imperfect frame; alveolar rhotic system per couto1994.

sentence: Ontem comprei fruta no lumo da tabanca.
ipa: 藞o虄te虄 ko虄藞prej 藞frut蓯 nu 藞lumu d蓯 t蓯藞b蓯虄k蓯
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought fruit at the village market.
notes: Kriol-origin lexicon 'lumo' (market) and 'tabanca' (village) per kihm1994; retained /ej/ in 'comprei' and alveolar trill [r] in 'fruta' per couto1994.

sentence: Para o ano vou viajar at茅 Bissau.
ipa: 藞par蓯 u 藞蓯nu 藞vo vi蓯藞蕭ar 蓯藞t蓻 bi藞s毯aw
gloss_en: Next year I will travel to Bissau.
notes: Guinean capital Bissau per kihm1994; open [蓻] in 'at茅', /o/ monophthong in 'vou'->[藞vo] and /aw/ in 'Bissau' per couto1994.

sentence: Liga-me mais tarde, por favor.
ipa: 藞li伞蓯 me 藞majs 藞tarde por f蓯藞v蓴r
gloss_en: Call me later, please.
notes: Open [蓴] in 'por'/'favor' and alveolar trill [r] in 'tarde' per couto1994; clitic imperative 'liga-me' per goncalves1996.

sentence: Ol谩, tudo bem na tua moran莽a?
ipa: o藞la 藞tudu 藞be虄 n蓯 藞tu蓯 mo藞r蓯虄s蓯
gloss_en: Hello, all well at your family compound?
notes: Kriol-origin lexicon 'moran莽a' (family compound) per kihm1994; alveolar trill [r] in 'moran莽a' and nasal [蓯虄] per couto1994.

sentence: Quem n茫o arrisca, n茫o petisca.
ipa: 藞ke虄 藞n蓯虄w虄 蓯藞risk蓯 藞n蓯虄w虄 pe藞tisk蓯
gloss_en: Nothing ventured, nothing gained.
notes: Alveolar trill [r] from 'rr' in 'arrisca' per couto1994; nasal diphthong [蓯虄w虄] in 'n茫o'; proverb register per goncalves1996.

sentence: O carro parou na estrada de terra.
ipa: u 藞karu p蓯藞ro n蓯 e藞strad蓯 de 藞t蓻r蓯
gloss_en: The car stopped on the dirt road.
notes: Alveolar trill [r] from 'rr' in 'carro' and in 'terra' per couto1994; retained /ou/->[o] in 'parou' per goncalves1996.

sentence: Ele trouxe um ramo de flores roxas.
ipa: 藞蓻le 藞tro蕛e 藞u虄 藞蕘amu de 藞fl蓴res 藞蕘蓴蕛蓯s
gloss_en: He brought a bunch of red flowers.
notes: Strong word-initial [蕘] in 'ramo'/'roxas' and 'ou' diphthong in 'trouxe' per couto1994; open [蓴] in 'roxas'/'flores' per goncalves1996.

sentence: 脌 tardinha gostamos de fazer djumbai na pra莽a.
ipa: a t蓯藞rdi刹蓯 伞o藞stamos de f蓯藞z蓻r d蕭u虄藞baj n蓯 藞pras蓯
gloss_en: In the late afternoon we like to hang out in the square.
notes: Kriol-origin lexicon 'djumbai' (chat, social gathering) per kihm1994; palatal [刹] in 'tardinha' and alveolar trill [r] per couto1994.

sentence: Aquele senhor vende jornais na esquina.
ipa: 蓯藞k蓻le se藞刹蓴r 藞ve虄de 蕭o藞rnajs n蓯 e藞skin蓯
gloss_en: That gentleman sells newspapers on the corner.
notes: Palatal [刹] in 'senhor' and alveolar trill [r] in 'senhor'/'jornais' per couto1994; open [蓻] in 'aquele' with coda /s/ kept alveolar and formal register per goncalves1996.

sentence: O melhor vinho branco vem de outra terra.
ipa: u me藞蕩蓴r 藞vi刹u 藞br蓯虄ku 藞ve虄 de 藞otr蓯 藞t蓻r蓯
gloss_en: The best white wine comes from elsewhere.
notes: Palatal [蕩] in 'melhor' and [刹] in 'vinho' per couto1994; 'ou' diphthong in 'outra' and alveolar trill [r] per goncalves1996.

sentence: Nunca vi um c茅u t茫o azul sobre o mar.
ipa: 藞nu虄k蓯 藞vi 藞u虄 s蓻藞u 藞t蓯虄w虄 蓯藞zu色 藞s蓴bre u 藞mar
gloss_en: I never saw such a blue sky over the sea.
notes: Nasal diphthong [蓯虄w虄] in 't茫o', open [蓻] in 'c茅u' and dark coda [色] in 'azul' per couto1994; alveolar trill [r] in 'sobre'/'mar' per goncalves1996.
